title: Automation to move files from one board to another
excerpt: I need attachments to move from one board to another without downloading and attaching to another board. I would love an automation for that.

posts.author: lbart424 (Lisa Bart)
posts.cookedHtml: I need attachments to move from one board to another without downloading and attaching to another board. I would love an automation for that.

posts.author: YuvrajSingh (Yuvraj Singh Rajput)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @lbart424, I know an app name Copy Files Pro available on monday marketplace that resolve this issue.

Using this app you can easily automate your current workflow. The app has automation recipes to copy files from one item/column to another across boards.

posts.author: nitesh (Nitesh Singh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @lbart424

Good news, Quick Copy & Move Files App is finally available in the marketplace!

You wanted an ability to copy or move files between columns, items and boards. So we developed a super easy solution!

1476×446 47.7 KB

Enjoy our Quick Copy & Move Files app today!

Copy & Move Files:

Quickly transfer files between columns, items, or across boards. Skip manual uploads.

Scenarios:

  • Within a board: Between columns and items.
  • Across boards: Move or copy files easily.

Sync Files Without Duplicates:

Sync files while avoiding redundant copies. Transfer only new files to keep boards clean and updated.

Rename Files Instantly

Rename files during transfers to maintain clarity and consistency. Add tags, dates, or project codes as needed.
